mapper.select: SELECT posting_id AS postingId, job_category AS jobCategory, company_name AS companyName, title, CAST(deadline AS DATE) AS deadline, skills, post_type AS postType, posting_url AS postingUrl, CAST(createdate AS DATE) AS createdate, contents, writer_id AS writerId FROM job_posting WHERE posting_id = #{postingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_posting ( posting_id, job_category, company_name, title, deadline, skills, post_type, posting_url, contents, writer_id, createdate ) VALUES ( seq_job_posting_id.NEXTVAL, #{jobCategory}, #{companyName}, #{title}, #{deadline, jdbcType=DATE}, #{skills}, #{postType}, #{postingUrl}, #{contents}, #{writerId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE job_posting SET job_category = #{jobCategory}, company_name = #{companyName}, title = #{title}, deadline = #{deadline, jdbcType=DATE}, skills = #{skills}, post_type = #{postType}, posting_url = #{postingUrl}, contents = #{contents}, createdate = SYSDATE WHERE posting_id = #{postingId} AND writer_id = #{writerId}
mapper.select: SELECT posting_id AS postingId, job_category AS jobCategory, company_name AS companyName, title, deadline, skills, post_type AS postType, posting_url AS postingUrl, createdate, contents FROM job_posting FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
